narrative:
Berne Twp township has 3,349 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 31.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 16.9 percentage points.
